name: K-Means
description: Primary production model. Elbow + silhouette k-selection, distance-metric sweep, ENSIA cluster interpretation.

name: Hierarchical (Ward)
description: Agglomerative clustering with dendrogram cut. Compare ARI vs K-Means baseline.

name: DBSCAN
description: Density-based clustering with noise points. Useful for outlier / disengaged detection.

name: Gaussian Mixture (GMM)
description: Soft cluster assignments and probabilistic profiles for intervention targeting.
